title: Building Overview
description: Building overview: purpose group, storey and space counts.

title: Storey Inventory
description: Storey inventory and typology (basement vs ground-and-above).

title: Space Ledger
description: Space ledger: every space with its storey, usage and area.

title: Space Usage Distribution
description: Space usage distribution: count of spaces per usage class.
text:
PREFIX ficr: <https://w3id.org/ficr#>
PREFIX bot: <https://w3id.org/bot#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?usage (COUNT(DISTINCT ?space) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?space ficr:hasSpaceUsage ?usage .
}
GROUP BY ?usage
ORDER BY DESC(?count) ?usage


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Element Inventory
description: ExternalWall counted separately); the materialised Wall total appears in B3.
text:
PREFIX ficr: <https://w3id.org/ficr#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?elementType (COUNT(DISTINCT ?e) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  VALUES ?elementType {
    ficr:Wall ficr:ExternalWall ficr:FloorSlab ficr:RoofSlab ficr:Doorset
    ficr:Window ficr:Opening ficr:Beam ficr:Ceiling ficr:Railing ficr:Stair
    ficr:StairFlight ficr:WallFoundation ficr:Furnishings
    ficr:FireExtinguisher ficr:Alarm
  }
  ?e rdf:type ?elementType .
}
GROUP BY ?elementType
ORDER BY DESC(?count) ?elementType


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Per Space Fire Protection
description: not the graph is reasoned — matching the converter-ABox-derived oracle.

title: Compliance Health Score
description: materialised graph (compartment walls are OWL-inferred CompartmentWall).

title: Element Rei Detail
description: Wall there. Compartment (party) walls surface positively as CompartmentWall.

title: Owl Inferred Classification
Finding Traceability
Risk Unit Inventory
description: Risk-unit inventory and spatial membership (installation status + covered spaces).

title: Boundary Condition Distribution
description: Boundary-assumption condition distribution per risk unit.

title: Evidence Completeness
description: a gap flag when an Unknown assumption has no evidence.

title: Risk Unit Confidence
description: row position and cross-checks the whole frame against expected_truth_table.csv.
text:
PREFIX ficr: <https://w3id.org/ficr#>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT ?unit
       (SUM(?isUnknown) AS ?unknownCount)
       (SUM(?isCompromised) AS ?compromisedCount)
       (SUM(?isGap) AS ?evidenceGapCount)
       (SUM(?isUnknown + ?isCompromised + ?isGap) AS ?priorityScore)
WHERE {
  ?ba a ficr:BoundaryAssumption ;
      ficr:appliesToRiskUnit ?unit ;
      ficr:hasConditionState ?state .
  BIND(IF(?state = ficr:Unknown, 1, 0) AS ?isUnknown)
  BIND(IF(?state = ficr:Compromised, 1, 0) AS ?isCompromised)
  OPTIONAL { ?ba ficr:supportedByEvidence ?ev . }
  BIND(IF(?state = ficr:Unknown && !BOUND(?ev), 1, 0) AS ?isGap)
}
GROUP BY ?unit
ORDER BY DESC(?priorityScore) DESC(?compromisedCount) ?unit


# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

title: Gap Consistency
description: pollute this negative control. C5 stays 0 asserted and materialised.

title: Risk Finding Traceability
description: condition state + evidence + evidence status. Exercises the full risk chain.

title: Inspection Workflow
description: Inspection workflow summary: event -> task -> assessment with planned times.

title: Assessment Results
description: the findings it produces, their result and the requirement's clause reference.
